message:
feat(vdbe): implement snapshot-independent rowid allocation for BEGIN CONCURRENT

Add a concurrent-mode rowid allocator (`alloc_rowid_concurrent`) to the VDBE
engine that derives the next candidate from max(visible rowid) + 1 rather than
relying on the potentially stale local counter. This is critical for correct
BEGIN CONCURRENT semantics where multiple writers must not collide on rowid
assignment from divergent snapshot state.

Changes:
- engine.rs: New `MemDatabase::alloc_rowid_concurrent()` method that scans
  visible rows for max rowid; `OP_NewRowid` handler now branches on `p3 != 0`
  to select concurrent vs serialized allocation path
- connection.rs: Integration test `test_begin_concurrent_newrowid_runtime_observes_flag`
  verifying that IMMEDIATE uses the counter-based path (rowid 12 after 11
  deleted rows) while CONCURRENT uses visible-max path (rowid 1 from empty
  visible set)
- correctness_mixed_dml.rs: Extract MIXED_DML_FAST_OPS (5k) and
  MIXED_DML_STRESS_OPS (20k) constants; default CI workload reduced to 5k for
  faster workspace-wide test runs while preserving the full 20k stress path as
  an explicit `#[ignore]` test (`mixed_dml_20k_ops_stress_no_mismatches`)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
